name: Brunswick Stew#1 (Chicken Only)
recipeIngredient: 1 large hen, steamed, boned, and diced (reserve broth)
Optional: Tabasco or other red hot pepper sauce to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook chicken broth.
2. Add diced chicken, tomatoes, juices, onions, and seasonings.
3. Simmer until fairly thick.
4. Stir in vegetables (lima beans, okra, corn).
5. Continue cooking until vegetables are done and stew reaches desired consistency.
6. Adjust seasoning to taste if needed.
